response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to map scenes. 2. Identified a dialogue-heavy opening (00:00-04:30) and a musical performance at the end (04:31-04:58). 3. OCR detected 'Mela!' and songwriting credits at 04:46. 4. Identified the artist as 'Ryokuoushoku Shakai'. 5. Used search query: '"Mela!" Ryokuoushoku Shakai Japanese and English lyrics' to successfully retrieve the original Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 6. Populated the JSON structure accordingly.
response.global_summary: A video containing a discussion about virtual YouTuber careers followed by a song performance. The final segment (04:31 - 04:58) features a vocal performance of "Mela!" by the virtual character Shion, joined by two other characters.

scenes.description: Discussion and dialogue between Yagoo and the virtual character Shion. No music.
Shion, Okayu, and Korone perform a song on stage. The song title 'Mela!' is shown on screen along with songwriting credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今なんじゃない？
メラメラとたぎれ
眠っているだけの正義
こんな僕も君のヒーローになりたいのさ
かっこいい君には 僕じゃ頼りないのかなんて
そりゃそうだよな
だって今もこうして迷ってる
手を取ってくれないか
ギブとテイクさ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Isn't it now or never?
Boiling with excitement
Justice just sleeping
I want to be your hero too
To the cool you
Am I unreliable?
That's right
Because even now I'm hesitating
Won't you take my hand?
Give and take
